PROTEIN NETWORKS PROJECT

We are trying to map the interactions between proteins encoded by the genome. We are also learning how to store this information and use it to extract information about gene function.

To this end, are looking for people to work on the project. (Link to RECRUITMENT)

Here are some readings that describe the enabling technology and some of the information it promises to deliver:

  • Finley and Brent 1994
  • Finley and Brent 1996
